title: CMD.CHN.001.DSH.SYNCHRONIZE_TIER — Apply a tier upgrade to the dashboard
description: Payload of the SYNCHRONIZE_TIER command. Issued by POL.CHN.001.DSH.ON_TIER_UPGRADE_RECORDED in response to BNK.RLVR.RVT.BSP.001.TIER_UPGRADE_RECORDED. Handled by AGG.CHN.001.DSH.BENEFICIARY_DASHBOARD. Internal command — no HTTP surface, no autonomous bus event. Idempotent on trigger.event_id (30 days). Stale events are acked-and-dropped (INV.DSH.003). NOTE: only tier UPGRADES are subscribed-to in FUNC-0009; downgrades are NOT propagated to the dashboard — see open question in README.

case_id.description: CORRELATION KEY. Reliever participation case identifier.

event_id.description: IDEMPOTENCY KEY. Identifier of the upstream BNK.RLVR.RVT.BSP.001.TIER_UPGRADE_RECORDED that triggered this command.

previous_tier_code.description: Tier code before the upgrade. Optional — null on the first transition for a freshly created aggregate.

current_tier_code.description: Tier code after the upgrade. The canonical definition of valid tier codes is held by BNK.RLVR.CAP.REF.001.TIE; the dashboard accepts any non-empty string and renders the localised label client-side.

upgraded_at.description: MONOTONICITY CHECK. Upstream transitioned_at. Rejected (STALE_EVENT) when older than the aggregate's persisted tier_upgraded_at.
